blockers.description: gsd-planner agent was running in background when session was closed — plan files may or may not have been written
blockers.workaround: On resume: check .planning/phases/03-normalization-and-ai-detection/ for 03-01-PLAN.md. If present, run /gsd-plan-phase 03 to trigger plan checker. If absent, re-run /gsd-plan-phase 03 to replan.

decisions.decision: AI package detection via hardcoded name-prefix list, no LLM
decisions.rationale: Zero runtime cost, predictable, v0.1 appropriate
No data loss, lenient on Specfy output variations

decisions.decision: Broad AI package list (~30 packages across providers/frameworks/RAG/local inference)
decisions.rationale: Engineers use crewai/llamaindex/etc not just openai

decisions.decision: v0.2 deferred: remote-maintained AI package list with local cache
decisions.rationale: Keeps list fresh without shipping new versions

next_action: Check if plan files exist in .planning/phases/03-normalization-and-ai-detection/. If yes, run /gsd-plan-phase 03 to trigger checker. If no plan files, re-run /gsd-plan-phase 03 --skip-research.
